title: Observer Torcher
description: This mod allows redstone torches and comparators to react to observer pulses
body:
First mod, boyyyy!!!

This mod allows redstone torches and comparators to react to observer pulses, as shrimple as that. The code isn't stellar but I'm satisfied with it, considering it's my first project.
The source code is in the "additional files" section

[Also available on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/observer-torcher/)
